description: CompositionBrown sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a hood with woven cotton drawstrings, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem, two insert pockets on the sides, branding in flock print on the chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsCosy and soft on your skin this stylish hooded sweatshirt from wrangler will keep you warm in the winter chill and will soon become a wardrobe favourite.  Pair this with jeans and sneakers or use it as an extra layer when you're off out for your early morning run.Model statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
